should_trigger: Run a technical SEO audit of the full site.
Audit our crawlability, robots.txt, and sitemap setup.
Check Core Web Vitals on mobile and assign owners to fixes.
Review canonicals, redirects, and indexation coverage in GSC.
Run a technical crawl and produce a severity-tagged findings report.
should_not_trigger: Find new keywords we should target.
Optimize the title and meta on /pricing.
Plan the internal-link graph for the blog hub.
Write the blog post targeting our new keyword.
Run an accessibility (a11y) audit on the checkout flow.
Profile the backend response time of the search API.
